impact: This gives the PP&D crawler and future validation tasks a committed, fixture-only inventory of authoritative public source categories with canonical URLs, authority labels, provenance, and recrawl cadence hints before any live crawling or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Add a deterministic public source inventory fixture for PP&D public permit, form, handout, fee, and DevHub guide categories.
target_task: Task checkbox-48: Add a fixture-only public source inventory for PP&D permit application, forms, handout, fee, and DevHub guide page categories with canonical URLs, authority labels, and recrawl cadence hints.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
